title: The War Is Over
actors: Yves Montand, Ingrid Thulin, Geneviève Bujold
plot: A veteran Republican fighter's ardent dedication to overthrow of Franco's regime is challenged. He realizes that the center of political struggle has shifted away from him, and is forced to make choices about his life and politica...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 4 nominations total
